title: Amtech B4300 Auto Wire Stripper
features: AUTOMATIC: This automatic wire stripper is suitable for solid and stranded wires from 0.5mm - 4mm diameter
VERSATILE: With a self-adjusting mechanism, these wire stripping pliers also have a handy cable cutter
PRACTICAL SIZE: 0.5mm length provides reach and stability.
PRECISION CONTROL: Easy to handle with good balance for accurate work.
LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN: Easy to store, making it a practical addition to any toolbox.
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x auto wire stripper See more
